title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ajio - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ajio - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ajio. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Ajio:
Ajio is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio!
